highlights.description: NothingToSay (Sand King) secures a decisive RAMPAGE with multiple consecutive kills, showcasing aggressive positioning and precise skill usage during a pivotal team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: This RAMPAGE moment shifts momentum, proving Sand King's dominance and validating the caster's early confidence in his mid-lane potential.

highlights.description: NothingToSay's Sand King executes a flawless sequence, eliminating three consecutive enemies with precise timing and ultimate usage during a critical teamfight.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage shifts momentum, showcasing Sand King's dominance and forcing the enemy to retreat, sealing XG's control over the map.

highlights.description: NothingToSay (Sand King) executes a flawless sequence of eight consecutive eliminations, using precise positioning and ultimate abilities to dismantle the enemy team in rapid succession.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage shifts momentum, showcasing dominance and turning a tense fight into a decisive victory.

highlights.description: NothingToSay's Sand King secures a critical kill during a team fight, showcasing precise timing and positioning that shifts momentum in favor of his team.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage moment defines the match's turning point, proving Sand King's dominance and validating his aggressive early game strategy.

highlights.description: NothingToSay's Sand King secures five consecutive kills in a decisive teamfight, showcasing unmatched aggression and precision under pressure.
highlights.ai_insight: This rampage shifts momentum entirely, silencing critics and cementing his dominance in a high-stakes Dota 2 broadcast.

highlights.description: NothingToSay (Sand King) executes a devastating solo kill on the enemy support, showcasing precise positioning and timing during a chaotic team fight.
highlights.ai_insight: His rampage shifts momentum, silencing the opposition and energizing his team with unmatched aggression.
